generated_oml:

import DTDFVocab from "http://www.example.org/DTDFVocab"
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring position data of the motor shaft",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox measuring position data of the gearbox output",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M)",

]

]
instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]
instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]
instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current (I_M) data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor encoder position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from current and motor parameters",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance DerivedParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Other derived parameters from sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor converting electrical current into rotational torque for motion"
]

    base:desc "Gearwheel gearbox converting rotational motion"
]
instance CycloidalGearGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear gearbox converting rotational motion"
]
instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for the first axis structure",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for the first axis structure",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance AASAsset : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset management and data exchange",

        RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
        DashboardVisualizationService

]

    base:desc "SysML for system modeling and structural analysis",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

        MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
    ]
]
instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

        DashboardVisualizationService
    ]
]
instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring and data display",

]

]

    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live sensor data streaming via MQTT."
]

]
